title: olearia glandulosa
intro: Olearia glandulosa, also known as the woolly daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The woolly daisy is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, due to its active ingredients like flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, Olearia glandulosa can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
